properties.name: Angel House Soup Kitchen - Austin Baptist Chapel
properties.description:
🚍 Learn More
Individuals can get assistance from this neighborhood center.
properties.Address: 908 E. Cesar Chavez St, Austin, TX 78702
properties.Hours: Every day 9:30 a.m. - 10 a.m. for breakfast and 11 a.m. - 12:30 p.m. for lunch. Closed on Thanksgiving and Christmas day.
properties.Comments: Showers and men’s clothing are also available during that time of service. Clothing is based on a first come first serve basis..

properties.name: Caritas of Austin - Downtown Headquarters
properties.description:
🚍 Learn More
The Community Kitchen serves free, nutritious lunches and the Pantry Program supplies take-home groceries to eligible clients.
properties.Eligibility: For clients enrolled in the housing or refugee resettlement programs can access the Caritas Pantry up to 10 times during their enrollment.  Call 512-974-4879 to see if you're eligible for their services.
properties.Hours: Community Kitchen Lunches: Monday - Friday: 11 a.m. - 12:30 p.m.

properties.name: Central Presbyterian Church
properties.Hours: Hot Breakfast: Thurs. 8:30—11:30am , Women’s Lunch: Tuesday at 12PM
properties.description:
🚍 Learn More
Offers essential food services to the community, providing hot meals and fostering fellowship. For more information, visit their website or contact them directly by phone.

_umap_options.name: Community Kitchens
_umap_options.description: This highlights establishments around the UT area with a dual mission: providing free hot meals to people in need, and promoting a strong community through shared food experiences.
